entities.name: Careerspan
entities.context: V's talent matching company whose operational model implements role separation

entities.name: Candidate-Employer Separation Principle
entities.context: Strict separation between candidate-facing and employer-facing representatives to facilitate honesty

entities.name: Advocacy vs. Evaluation Conflict
entities.context: The conflict when a single person manages both candidate coaching and employer selling, leading to performative behavior

entities.name: Psychological Safety Zone
entities.context: Environment enabling deeper candidate honesty created through structural role separation

entities.name: Dual Agency Protections
entities.context: Legal/real estate principle preventing conflicts of interest through role separation

entities.name: Trusted Advisor Role
entities.context: Candidate-facing representative who acts as ally/coach, not gatekeeper

entities.name: Evaluator/Broker Role
entities.context: Employer-facing representative who maintains objective assessment function

relationships.context: Operational model should explicitly prevent same team member from owning both candidate and employer relationships
Mirrors legal/real estate protections that prevent conflicts of interest
Structural solution that addresses the gatekeeper dynamic
Separation creates the safety zone that enables candidate honesty
Complementary roles that must be held by different people for same placement
